reason_for_decision: The article is clear, technically responsible, and strong enough to pass as a Foundation entry on UTM and U-space without revision.
strengths: The article gives beginners a reliable mental model by separating UTM as a broader coordination concept from U-space as a specific European framework.
The service-layer explanation is practical and helps readers understand why traffic management is more than a tracking dashboard.
The comparison with traditional air traffic control and the section on Remote ID add strong decision value and reduce common beginner confusion.
summary_assessment: This is a strong Foundation article: it is readable, accurately framed, and useful enough to pass without revision.
